s57prod.remarks: Chart Pilot Ltd. established in 1998 and based in Saint-Petersburg, Russia. Chart Pilot Ltd. is the official distributor of nautical navigational charts and publications. At the same time Company consider itself as production-technological firm in field of cartographic works. Chart Pilot Ltd. Electronic Charts Department was founded in 2002 and manufactures charts according to the S-57 using a certified technology with annual capacity to 400-450 electronic charts. Chart Pilot wants to create S-57 Producer Code that will be used in a cell name ENC. Currently, Chart Pilot Ltd. no have S-57 Producer Code.

s57prod.remarks: SeaZone will generate un-encrypted contextual and thematic digital mapping data products where during production a portion of marine data will be captured and encoded to the S57 standard. The production agency code will be used during this stage and therefore visible in product output downstream of this. Production extent is likely to be international (worldwide)
s57prod.name: Keiran Millard

s57prod.remarks: The Panama Canal Authority is an autonomous legal entity of the Republic of Panama, is in charge of the administration, operation, conservation, maintenance, modernization, and the Canal Operation Compatibility Area of the Panama Canal and its related activities according to the "Political Constitution of the Republic of Panama-Title XIV".  The regulation on navigation in the Panama Canal Operation Compatibility Area involves the course of the Panama Canal and the generally contiguous to it, running from the Atlantic Ocean to the Pacific Ocean. It includes the Atlantic entrance and its anchorages areas, the port of Cristobal, Gatun Locks, Gatun Dam, Gatum Spillway, Gatun Lake, Gaillard Cut, Pedro Miguel Locks, Miraflores Lake, Miraflores Locks, the port of Balboa, the Pacific Entrance and its anchorage areas, as well as land and water areas encompassing them.  With the Canal Expansion Program is also included two new sets of locks, one on the Pacific and one on the Atlantic side of the
s57prod.name: Jaime Rodriguez Beckertt

s57prod.remarks: SHOM wants to create special ENC to test ECDIS in order to know of the ECDIS tested is S-63 1.0 compliant or S-63 1.1 compliant. We would like to differentiate these special ENC from the usual french ENC (FRXXXXXX).

Our company collects water depths data with existing fleet of commercial inland vessels, sailing on the European waterways (see: https://www.covadem.org/?locale=en).

s57prod.remarks: Maritime and River Informational Systems LLC, in short MORIS LLC, with its registered office at 3, Block 1, Letter M, 22-th line of Vasil'yevskiy Ostrov, 199026, St. Petersburg, Russian Federation Production of IENC, 1000 cells for inland waterways of West Part of Russia from West border of Russia to Ural Mountains including rivers Neva, Volkhov, Vytegra, Sheksna, Volga, Kama, Don, Oka, Moskva, Akhtuba, lakes Ladoga, Onega, Beloe, some local rivers, lakes and water reservoirs.

s57prod.remarks: We want to register as Lloyd’s Register Voyage AS. The name C-MAP will remain with Navico so we are in the process of rebranding all products where we now use C-MAP. (There will still be C-MAP products available for recreational users. These remains in Navico.)

s57prod.name: Jens Peter Weiss Hartmann

s57prod.remarks: Mapitech is a company founded in 2012. Core business are inland lakes ENCs. They are mainly focused on European lakes in Spain, Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Italy, UK, Sweden etc.. Recently have also produced ENC cells in Canada and USA.
s57prod.name: David Panicucci

s57prod.remarks: Nautitec Shiphandling Simulator and Training Center is located in Leer, Germany. The philosophy of our company is to support the maritime education at the location in Leer as well as to support young students in their aim to start a career at sea.
s57prod.name: Günter Gerjets

s57prod.remarks: the USM Hydrographic Science Research Center (HSRC), in association with the Hydrographic Science Academic Programs uses the IHO S-57 Standard for the exchange of digital hydrographic data with its partners, the Government of Mississippi, the US Navy, the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency and the NOAA/Office of Coast Survey. The production is in its early stages and is increasing in parallel with investments in Marine Spatial Data Infrastructure and in the use of the IHO S-100 Product Specifications as they are adopted.
s57prod.agencyName: Hydrographic Science Research Center, The University of Southern Mississippi
s57prod.name: Alberto Costa Neves

s57prod.remarks: Inland Waterway Authority of India (IWAI) is a Government organization for the development of IENCs for the National Waterway in India under Ministry of Port, Shipping and Waterways (MoPS&W).  Web site https://iwai.nic.in/.
s57prod.name: Commander Mahendra Kumar

s57prod.remarks:
SiiTech has developed ENC SDK for iOS (iPhones). We supply our ENC SDK to mobile navigational app developers, so they could build mobile navigational app on top of SiiTech ENC SDK.
Also SiiTech supplies ENCs via ENC SDK.
The goal is to supply boaters around the world with up-to date, best available charts, so they can sail safely.
s57prod.name: Alex Morkin

s57prod.remarks: Digital products compiled by the UKHO for the Royal Navy, the code would clearly indicate to the RN Navigators the defence product loaded on the Ships WECDIS. It would be global to reflect the RN’s operating capabilities.

s57prod.remarks:
The Naval Meteorological &Oceanographic Office in the Taiwan inherits the hydrographic office in the Republic of China which went over 100 years on the charting and hydrographic surveying in Chinese history.
Nowadays, the S-57 ENC cells are in a very stable production line in Taiwan and which is hosted by the Naval Meteorological &Oceanographic Office. An approved producer/agency code is necessary to the responsibility of chart production  in Taiwan.
s57prod.name: Yves Guillam
